metaTitle: QR Code Generator — Create Free Static QR Codes (Private & Offline)
metaDescription: Generate high-quality QR codes for URLs, Wi-Fi, and Text instantly. 100% private — your data never leaves your browser. Download as PNG or SVG for professional printing.
introSummary: Our professional QR Code Generator is a security-focused utility designed for businesses, event organizers, and everyday users. Unlike common online generators that track your scans or store your URLs, our tool operates entirely on-device. Create high-contrast, scan-ready QR codes for your website, contact information, or secure Wi-Fi access in seconds. With support for scalable SVG exports, you can ensure your codes remain crisp and scannable from business cards to giant billboards.

contextUsage.title: For Business & Marketing
contextUsage.desc: Bridge the gap between physical and digital by adding secure QR codes to menus, flyers, and professional business cards.

contextUsage.title: For Secure Wi-Fi Sharing
contextUsage.desc: Share your home or office network credentials instantly without revealing your plain-text password to guests.

contextUsage.title: For Contact & Events
contextUsage.desc: Generate QR codes for email addresses or event landing pages to streamline user engagement and RSVP processes.

howto.description: Select the appropriate tab: URL for websites, Wi-Fi for network access, or Text/Email for specific messages and contact info.
Enter your destination link or credentials. The QR pattern updates in real-time within your browser's memory.
Use your smartphone's camera to test the live preview on your screen to ensure the data is accurate before exporting.
Download as a high-resolution PNG for digital use or a scalable SVG vector for professional, large-scale printing.

why: Zero-Knowledge Privacy — Your URLs, messages, and Wi-Fi passwords are never sent to a server. Everything is generated 100% locally.
Scalable SVG Support — Export your code in vector format (SVG), allowing for infinite resizing without any pixelation or quality loss.
Permanent Static Codes — The codes you generate here never expire and don't require a subscription, as the data is encoded directly into the pattern.
Instant Wi-Fi Access — Create QR codes that allow guests to join your WPA/WPA2 or WEP networks with a single scan—no typing required.
High-Contrast Accuracy — Optimized for maximum readability across all modern iOS and Android devices, even in low-light conditions.
Works 100% Offline — Once loaded, the generator remains fully functional without an internet connection, ensuring total data isolation.

faq.q: Are the QR codes generated here permanent?
faq.a: Yes. These are 'Static' QR codes. Since the data is hardcoded into the black-and-white pattern itself, they will work forever and never 'expire'.

faq.q: Why is privacy important for a QR generator?
faq.a: Many generators track who scans your code or store your destination URL on their servers. Our tool keeps your data private by generating the code locally on your device.

faq.q: What is the advantage of the SVG format?
faq.a: SVG is a vector file. Unlike PNG, you can scale it to the size of a building and it will remain perfectly sharp. This is essential for professional graphic designers and high-quality printing.

faq.q: Can I change the URL of a QR code later?
faq.a: Because these are static codes for maximum privacy and longevity, the content is fixed once generated. To change the destination, you must create a new QR code.

faq.q: Why isn't my QR code scanning?
faq.a: Ensure there is enough 'Quiet Zone' (white space) around the code. If your content is extremely long, the pattern might be too dense; try using a URL shortener first.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Ensures no data leaves the user's device
Global compatibility with all QR scanners
Optimal balance between data density and scan reliability
Supports both web display and professional offset printing
Supports URLs, long text, and complex Wi-Fi credentials

troubleshooting: Pattern looks too complex? Use a URL shortener to reduce the amount of data. Simpler patterns scan much faster on older mobile devices.
Blurry print results? Always use the SVG download for physical prints. PNG is intended for digital screens and small-scale use only.
Wi-Fi tab not working? Double-check your SSID and Password cases. Wi-Fi credentials are case-sensitive and must be exact.
proTips: Design Tip: Download the SVG file and open it in tools like Canva or Illustrator to add your brand colors, provided you maintain high contrast.
Always leave a white border (Quiet Zone) around your QR code when placing it on a design; otherwise, scanners may fail to recognize the edges.
For business cards, keep your QR code at least 2cm x 2cm (0.8in x 0.8in) to ensure it remains easy to scan for all users.
